content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the car positioned slightly left of center, well within track boundaries and on course.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 109, target index = (109+5) % 121 = 114
- WP114: x=1.862565, y=0.707354
- Car: x=1.664770, y=0.798695, heading=-42.422°
- dy = 0.707354 - 0.798695 = -0.091341
- dx = 1.862565 - 1.664770 = +0.197795
- bearing = atan2(-0.091341, 0.197795) = atan2(-0.091341, 0.197795) ≈ -24.77°
- delta = -24.77° - (-42.422°) = +17.65°
- Normalize: +17.65° → steer LEFT

**Boundary check:**
- is_left_of_center = true, distance_from_center = 0.04120m
- track half-width = 0.38015m
- edge_distance = 0.38015 - 0.04120 = 0.33895m → clear (>0.20m)
- delta = +17.65° → |delta| 15-30°: steering_angle=+10, speed=1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead with car slightly left of center; WP114 gives delta≈+17.7° indicating moderate left correction needed, applying steering_angle=+10 at speed=1.5.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length.",
    "WP0-20: long straight along y≈0.683 heading east.",
    "WP24-44: left curve from east to west, requires sustained positive steering.",
    "WP44-55: straight westward along y≈2.77.",
    "WP82-96: sharp south/southeast curve — large positive delta, need max left steering.",
    "WP97-115: heading ~-42°, car descending southeast — moderate positive deltas, left corrections needed.",
    "WP107-115: waypoints curve southeast then east, delta ~+12 to +18°, use steering_angle=+5 to +10.",
    "When |delta| < 5°, use steering_angle=0 at speed=1.5 to avoid oscillation.",
    "When |delta| 5-15°, use steering_angle=±5 at speed=1.5.",
    "Car consistently slightly left of center in WP107-115 zone; moderate left corrections keep it on line."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.541, 1.606, 1.665],
    "y": [0.920, 0.854, 0.799],
    "heading": [-40.772, -42.009, -42.422]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP114 at (1.863, 0.707): bearing≈-24.77°, delta≈+17.65° → steer left, steering_angle=+10.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 10.0
}
```
